description: Review-only contract for future local KosmoOrbit data storage, retention, backup and privacy boundaries.
governance_principles: Local office data must stay local unless a human explicitly approves another path.
KosmoOrbit may prepare decisions, but stored records need owner, privacy and retention rules first.
Learning and apprentice data must avoid scoring, surveillance and public exposure.
Backup, delete, export and restore paths must be understandable to a small architecture office.

data_domains.label: Projektwissen
data_domains.retention_gate: Projektleitung + Owner bestaetigen Projektablage, Aufbewahrung und Loeschfrist.
data_domains.backup_gate: IT/KI bestaetigt lokale Backup- und Restore-Regel.

data_domains.label: Assets und Rechte
data_domains.retention_gate: Owner bestaetigt Rechtekette, Lizenzstatus und Public-Safe-Grenze.
data_domains.backup_gate: Asset-Bibliothek bekommt getrennte Backup- und Versionierungsregel.

data_domains.label: Profile und Sessions
data_domains.retention_gate: Owner + Datenschutz Review bestaetigen Consent, Retention und Offboarding.
data_domains.backup_gate: Profile duerfen erst nach Recovery-/Loeschprozess gesichert werden.

data_domains.label: Audit und Entscheide
data_domains.retention_gate: Owner bestaetigt, welche Entscheide rechtlich relevant gespeichert werden.
data_domains.backup_gate: Audit-Logs brauchen manipulationsarme lokale Sicherung und Exportregel.

data_domains.label: Ausbildung und Lernen
data_domains.retention_gate: Ausbildner + Owner bestaetigen, ob Lernhistorie ueberhaupt gespeichert werden darf.
data_domains.backup_gate: Lernnotizen duerfen nicht mit Projekt- oder Public-Daten vermischt werden.

storage_lanes.today: Static JSON artifacts in the repo are read for review only.
storage_lanes.future_requirement: Replace preview artifacts with a local office storage model only after schema and backup review.

storage_lanes.today: No real office store exists in this static preview.
storage_lanes.future_requirement: Local store needs encryption, role boundaries, backup, restore and delete/export flows.

storage_lanes.today: External collaboration is only a future concept.
storage_lanes.future_requirement: Fachplaner/client exchange needs explicit format, consent, versioning and liability gates.

promotion_requirements: Data classification for project, asset, identity, audit and learning records.
Owner-approved retention and deletion policy per data domain.
Local backup and restore test before any persistent office store.
Privacy review for personal data, learning data and audit logs.
Export format and offboarding process for profiles and project records.
Human-readable incident and rollback plan for corrupted or wrongly stored data.
next_actions: Use this contract before implementing any local Orbit database, backup job or persistent office memory.
Keep all /orbit data reads static until storage, retention and privacy rules are approved.
Connect this governance contract to future KosmoData, KosmoAsset and Local Identity storage work.
